releaseBody:
(AI Generated).

## Freed v26.4.2401-dev

Friends graph workspace and preview fixes, complete phase 3 save-for-later truth pass, and unify desktop shell chrome

### Features

- Friends graph workspace and preview fixes
- Complete phase 3 save-for-later truth pass
- Unify desktop shell chrome

### Fixes

- Release build and type-safety cleanup
- Reader, feed, and header polish
- Sync google contacts platform test cast
- Prevent fatal google contacts oauth crash
- Warm PWA article images for offline reading
- Clarify desktop update channel state
- Raise update dialogs above floating new button
- Desktop e2e merge regression resolved

### Follow-ups

- Reverse integrate main after v26.4.2305
- Split dev and production validation tiers
- Merge latest dev before release
- Make feature workflow preview-first
- Promote latest dev into main
- Reduce desktop memory pressure
- Sync UI package exports before production release
- Global command palette
- Stop release workflow deploying website
- Tiered validation and reverse merge workflow

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
